original_image_tags: A black-and-white photocopy of a typed form. A large "CONFIDENTIAL" stamp is at the top center and a second identical stamp is at the bottom right. There are punch holes on the left margin. A handwritten "8" is in the bottom right corner.

elements.description: A typed checklist document titled 'CHECK-LIST - UNIDENTIFIED FLYING OBJECTS' regarding Incident #3, dated 7 July 1947. The page contains numbered text fields detailing an observation at Muroc Army Air Field, including details such as object description (sphere, yellowish white, 5-10 feet in diameter) and observer Major J. C. Wise. The page includes the stamped text 'COPY' in the top left, and a large 'CONFIDENTIAL' stamp at both the top and bottom.

judge.reason: Description B quotes specific typed text ('CHECK-LIST - UNIDENTIFIED FLYING OBJECTS', incident details, 'COPY' stamp) that Description A does not mention, indicating a fundamental disagreement on the visual content of the document.
